notes:
Platinum-series set (pl3), DP/Platinum-era 10-card booster, 36 packs/box, NO ETB. Pack structure confirmed for the era (Bulbapedia booster pack page + D&P structure): 10 cards = 5 common + 3 uncommon + 1 reverse-holo + 1 rare-or-better. Buckets used are a subset of the set's available buckets {rare-holo, rare, uncommon, common, lv-x, secret-rare}.

Rare-or-better slot distribution: rare 0.589, rare-holo 0.30, lv-x 0.097, secret-rare 0.014 (sums to 1.0).
- lv-x 0.097: SV is Lv.X-rich at ~3-4 Lv.X per booster box (community samples = ~1:9-1:12 packs). 3.5/36 packs = 0.097. This is more generous than the Flipside era "later Lv.X 1:18" baseline because SV specifically runs 3-4/box per multiple dealer/community sources. 7 Lv.X exist in the set.
- secret-rare 0.014: era secret-rare baseline ~1:72 packs (~1:2 boxes), per Flipside (Time-Space Distortion reference). SV has 3 secret rares (Articuno 148/147, Moltres 149/147, Zapdos 150/147). 1/72 = 0.0139.
- rare-holo 0.30: era convention ~1-in-3 packs yields a holo rare (14 holo-rares in set). Remainder goes to non-holo rare.

Reverse-holo slot distribution: distributed across reverse-eligible base rarities (common/uncommon/rare; holo-rare/lv-x/secret-rare are NOT reverse-eligible in this era) by relative pool size (45 common, 47 uncommon, 37 rare; pool 129): common 0.35, uncommon 0.36, rare 0.29 (sums to 1.0).

confidence=low: no per-set published pull-rate study exists for SV; figures are era-average rates (Flipside community review) plus SV-specific community Lv.X-per-box samples, mapped onto the set buckets. Vintage box price carries a large sealed-collector premium, so EV/booster will be far below box price — expected, rates NOT inflated to compensate.

INTEGRITY: minor source discrepancy noted — some eBay listings label SV packs "Pack of 10 Cards" while one listing said 10; Bulbapedia confirms all DP/Platinum-era English packs are 10 cards, so packSize=10 (NOT the 9-card prompt baseline, which was a DP-era generalization; SV is 10). Bulbapedia set page lists 14 rare-holo / 34 rare / 39 uncommon / 59 common for the numbered run but the authoritative bucket counts supplied by the task {rare-holo:14, rare:37, uncommon:47, common:45, lv-x:7, secret-rare:3} were used for the distributions.
